arts.ttl: Ex-Tottenham star aims dig at Arsenal before PSV Champions League clash
arts.sum: Ivan Perisic struck a confident tone before going up against Arsenal with PSV in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Arsenal midfielder on £200k per week emerges as a target for three European clubs
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta is looking to revamp his midfield in the summer transfer window. Arteta wants younger players in his team and particularly in the midfield position due to the presence of Thomas Partey and Jorginho. With both the midfielders well into their 30s, the Premier League giants are looking for more athletic and […] The post Arsenal midfielder on £200k per week emerges as a target for three European clubs appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Four things spotted in Arsenal training before PSV clash as Arteta drops cryptic team news hint
arts.sum: Ahead of what is a huge clash in the wider context of the Gunners' season, Arteta relaxed his squad with some fun warmup drills and team-building games. Mikel Arteta put his players through their paces ahead of Arsenal's clash against PSV Eindhoven .

arts.ttl: Timber: Champions League offers chance for Arsenal to change narrative
arts.sum: "I think we have so much quality in our group, of course we have a lot of injuries, especially up front, but it's a beautiful challenge for us to put our front players - or anyone - to score goals and hopefully we can show that," Timber said. "I think tomorrow is a beautiful game to change the narrative and to win," Timber said on his return to his homeland.

arts.ttl: Tottenham have their eyes on signing £49m Arsenal target who said he's 'similar' to Declan Rice - journalist
arts.sum: "He is a similar type of player to me." 🤯

arts.ttl: Arsenal caught in PSV mind games as Thomas Partey transfer update given
arts.sum: Arsenal will come up against former Spurs man Perisic and his PSV team in the first leg tonight (8pm kick-off). It’s back to Champions League action for Arsenal tonight as they take on Dutch side PSV Eindhoven in the first leg of their last 16 clash.

arts.ttl: Arsenal early Champions League team news vs PSV as six hints dropped before Mikel Arteta decision
arts.sum: Arsenal have hinted Riccardo Calafiori could start again despite Myles Lewis-Skelly being available to play against PSV in their Champions League round of 16 tie. Calafiori started both matches, with the teenager briefly replacing him as a substitute in the former.
